title: gilia coronopifolia
intro: Gilia coronopifolia, also known as the Globe Gilia or Globe Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gilia coronopifolia include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Gilia coronopifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory health and alleviate congestion.
